notableEvents.label: Patrick Bailey GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Bailey grounds into a double play, first baseman Ben Rice to shortstop José Caballero to pitcher Will Warren. Harrison Bader out at 2nd. Patrick Bailey out at 1st.
